title: SEALAPACK SAP1082 Storage Clips, Plastic
features: FRESHER 4 LONGER SECURE CLIPS: Sealapack Storage Clips, handy ready to use home, office or garage essential, securely seal open packs of bread, fruit, pulses, pasta- anything in a packet ! Pack includes sizes to fit most pack sizes
COST SAVER: No need to decant open bags into storage jars, simply clip the bag to use at a later date, perfect for open bags of cereal, pulses,pasta or rice, no need to purchase storage containers
VERSATILE: Clip open packets of pasta, pitta bread, sliced bread, bagels, fresh vegetables, dried or fresh herbs, large size bags of torillas and crisps.

FREEZER IDEAS: Buy a sliced loaf of bread, remove the seal, gently shake to separate the slices, re-seal with a clip seal and place in the freezer. Remove as many slices as required, either leave to naturally defrost or place in the microwave for 10-15 seconds to defrost, ready to use to either toast or prepare a lunchbox or picnic sandwich
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 12 CLIPS
description: Sealapack Storage Clips, handy ready to use kitchen essential, securely seal open packs of rbreadn, pasta, lentils, dried fruit - anything in a packet ! Clip open packets of pasta, pitta bread, sliced bread, bagels, fresh vegetables, dried or fresh herbs, large size bags of torillas and crisps. Remove as many slices as required, either leave to naturally defrost or place in the microwave for 10-15 seconds to defrost, ready to use to either toast or prepare a lunchbox or picnic sandwich. Pack of 12 clips
